parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={{ { "model": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_model, "prompt": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.prompt, "stream": false, "keep_alive": $items("Build LLM Prompt")[0].json.ollama_keep_alive, "options": { "num_predict": 4096, "temperature": 0.1 }, "stop": ["Now convert", "Example input", "


"] } }}

={{ (() => { const p = $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json; const stmts = (p.cleanupStatements || []).map(s => ({ statement: s })); stmts.push({ statement: p.cypher }); return { statements: stmts }; })() }}

={{ { "statements": [ { "statement": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.postProcess, "parameters": { "project": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.project_name } }, { "statement": "MATCH (r:Rule) WHERE r.graph = 'Metagraph' AND (r.description IS NULL OR r.description = '') SET r.description = $description", "parameters": { "description": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.rules_text || '' } } ] } }}

={{ (() => { return { statements: [{ statement: "MATCH (n) WHERE (n:Class OR n:DatatypeProperty OR n:ObjectProperty) AND n.graph = 'OntoGraph' RETURN labels(n)[0] AS nodeLabel, n.iri AS iri, coalesce(n.label, '') AS label, coalesce(n.SWRL_label, '') AS swrl_label, coalesce(n.range, '') AS range ORDER BY nodeLabel, iri" }, { statement: "MATCH (r:Rule) WHERE r.graph = 'Metagraph' RETURN r.Rule_Id AS rule_id, coalesce(r.text, '') AS text, coalesce(r.kind, '') AS kind ORDER BY r.Rule_Id" }] }; })() }}
